entry.title: Re: Special Edition on Data Federation and the KSA Data Center
entry.content:
Hi,

this has been shared in our 'What's new' on Help Portal as part of the December release as 'Cross Data Center Connections' and 'New Data Center' and should be available in test as well as production tenants IF their are on the new the multi-cloud environment of SAP BTP as the integration platform.

Best

Corinna

entry.title: Re: CAP Multitenancy TypeScript application fails to access/create tenants

entry.title: Restricting Input Box to Accept Only Numeric Data in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a Data Entity with a field where the data type is set to Number. Then, I created a Page Variable with the data type also set to Number.

I added an Input Box and bound it to the Page Variable. The data entered in the Input Box is supposed to be stored in the data entity field, which only accepts numeric values.

Issue:

Even though the data type is set to Number in both the Page Variable and the Data Entity field, the Input Box still allows the user to enter and save non-numeric values.

Question:

How can I restrict the Input Box to accept only numeric values and prevent the user from entering non-numeric characters?

entry.title: Re: Extending a Standard API - A Guide to Enhancing API_QUALITYNOTIFICATION
entry.content:
Dear SAP Members,

We recently worked on API extension's. Please see the steps below.

In my case we needed to add 2 additional fields in the output

1) Find service definition name from sap.api.com. Go to hana studio, search->'ABAP Search Object'.

   Enter the service name ''API_FUNCTIONALLOCATION'.

 

 

2) in my case, i need to add 2 fields under 'A_FunctionalLocation'.

   you need to find the lower level view to add the fields.

  Go to SE11, enter the view name:

 

 

again, open SE11 and check 'R_FunctionalLocationTP'.

 

 

 

again open SE11 and check if any view is available under I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION.

 

 

A_FunctionalLocation

    R_FunctionalLocationTP

     I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION

 

So we need to extend the lower level view :      I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION.

1) Extend the CDS view using HANA.

sample logic below:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXXXXX'
@EndUserText.label: 'Functional Location Service Extension'
extend view I_FunctionalLocation with ZXXXXXXXX

association [1..1] to Jest as _jest on $projection.MaintObjectInternalID = _jest.objnr and _jest.inact = ''
{
_jest.stat as stat,
_jest.inact as inact
}

 

Nest step is extend the view entity option while creating the CDS view for upper levels:

Create the extended view for 2 upper levels (in my case 😞

**************************************************************************************

 

extend view entity R_FunctionalLocationTP with {
I_FunctionalLocation.stat,
I_FunctionalLocation.inact
}

*****************************************************************************************

extend view entity A_FunctionalLocation with {
_FunctionalLocationTP.stat,
_FunctionalLocationTP.inact
}

***********************************************************************************

Once CDS views extended, Add & activate the service using t.code '/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE'.

select 'Add service' and find service 'API_FUNCTIONALLOCATION'.

Once it is activated, check in SICF if it is activated or not. If not activate 

 

Mandatory thing here is, select the service and 'Load the metadata' in '/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE'.

Test the service, IN my case it is GET method.

 

Thank You,

SRini.

entry.title: Re: Report Painter - Exit or BADI or ENH

entry.title: Re: Launching the RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard for Your SAP Transformation Journey
entry.content:
Hello,

@wagener-mark data collection happens once per week via Early Watch Alert. Usually beginning of the week. New data is visible later 2-3 days later in the dashboard. So in your case, if you just switched on SUSG/SCMON mid of last week, this should be visible in the dashboard mid-end of this week.

@AhmarImam can you see the system view tile, but can't select any systems to show the dashboard for? Or can you select systems, but then don't see any data for the selected system in the dashboard? Please open a support incident for your question on component SV-CLM-RMD. In the incident you can also share details on the system you are referring to and we can check specifically for that system.

BR,
Markus

entry.title: Re: In SAP Business One, how can I check how many items have been issued against my Employee Code?
entry.content:
Hello,

You wanna know how many lines of marketing documents that the employee is the owner of the document?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
It depends on the exact requirements, but in general, when using EML and writing a unit test for it, I would first go towards mocking the RAP BO. Likely with the Transactional Buffer Double framework (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/transactional-buffer-double-support) when just doing CRUD operations. Then the inner workings of the RAP BO would not be tested, but at least you would know that your EML itself is valid.

For complex and important processes, a test on a higher level of the testing pyramid, like an integration test with real data, would then be an additional option.

entry.title: Re: Request for Adjustment of Movement Type for Goods Rec...
entry.content: Did you try via MIGO where also, without P/O reference, system will allow to post with 501 movement type.  For this to happen, select "Goods Receipt" and "Other"

entry.title: Re: Missing connection of material in plant to the material ledger+C+470
entry.content: Please execute below SE38 program with material and plant(valuation area). FML_REPAIR_ML_MASTERDATA

entry.title: Re: How do you define a workflow consultant?
entry.content: This is actually a very good question. As an FI functional consultant,  I faced a situation where changes were needed in the approval matrix for parked documents workflow. The approvals determination logic were quite complicated, somehow I handled it, there was a lot of pain. Now, the workflows work as expected, but my management didn’t even realize this was outside my actual responsibilities.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: What’s New as of 2025-02-03?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community members,

I'm excited to start 2025 with a fresh wave of SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM) features and enhancements, focusing on Administration, Process, RFA and Layout functionality.

If you haven’t had the opportunity to explore the previous blog posts shared by my colleagues, feel free to check out this PaPMCloudWhatsNew tag for quick access. 

Let’s dive into the latest updates!


Administration

SAP PaPM Cloud SM integration with SAP Cloud Transport Management

The much-awaited integration of SAP PaPM Cloud SM to SAP Cloud Transport Management is now available for administrators and content managers. To gain further insight, visit the SAP PAPM Cloud SM integration with SAP cTMS blog post.


Addition of the ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_READ Role

We are introducing the ‘ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_READ’ role, providing administrators with read-only access to the Environment Access Management (EAM) screen. This allows them to view its contents without making any modifications. Previously, the only available role, ‘ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_ALL’ granted both read and edit permissions.

When the Administrator is assigned with ‘ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_READ’ role, the ‘Edit’ button on the EAM screen is deactivated.

To learn more about the EAM screen, check out our earlier SAP PaPM Cloud SM: Introducing the Environment Access Management Screen blog post. For details on role assignments, refer to the Administration Guide through this link.

 

Process Management

Change of Column Title from 'Process ID' to 'Process'

In the Process Management screen, the Process ID column name has been changed to 'Process' to align with the Process field used in other screens such as Modeling (process template) and Process Scheduler.



Layout

Enhancement of Default Layout Functionality

In our previous New Layout Functionality blog post, we highlighted the ability to copy a public layout to the private layout. Today, we’re pleased to announce an enhancement to this feature, enabling users to set their own default layout on the private layout as well.

The improved Private Default Layout functionality is now available across the System, Administration, Show, Analyze, Visualize, and Report elements screens. With this update, users can create and save a Private Default layout that is exclusive to them, reducing the dependency on public layouts that others can modify. This offers greater flexibility and more personalized experience in managing layout settings.

Key Highlights of the Enhanced Features:

  • Individual Default Settings for Both Private and Public Layout: Default layout settings are now available separately for both the private and public sections within the Show, Analyze, and Visualize screens. The default setting is no longer applied globally for all users. Each user can now define their own default layout.
  • Private Layouts: When a user creates a new private layout, it’s automatically set as their default layout. Similarly, if a user moves or copies a public layout to the private section, this layout will also be automatically set as their default.
  • Removed Default Layouts: If a user removes their default layout, the system will automatically reset the default layout to the public layout named ‘Standard’. If no other layout is available except the Standard layout, it will be set as the user's default layout.

For more information, visit our Application Help.


RFA

Addition of Extension Fields for RFA AP/AR Items

When working with SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM), posting allocations to SAP systems for certain countries requires the inclusion of a Business Place field. This is crucial for compliance with legal and statutory reporting requirements and ensuring successful allocation postings across SAP systems. To fulfill this requirement, a new enhancement has been introduced for Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR) items. This enhancement adds extension fields to these Remote Function Adapters (RFAs), enabling users to map Business Places for their postings.

This feature is particularly valuable for multinational companies operating in regions where Business Place is mandatory for legal reporting, ensuring compliance with country-specific regulations. By supporting Business Place mapping, it eliminates barriers to allocation postings, improves reporting accuracy, and provides a compliant and efficient way for managing AR and AP postings across various company codes. This advancement makes SAP PaPM Cloud SM more robust and adaptable to global business needs, empowering users to streamline their legal and statutory reporting processes seamlessly.

 

Thank you and stay tuned for the next edition of our “What’s New” series.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - How to Configure Deployed Secure Parameter in HTTP Adapter Authentication
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for sharing. 

One thing I would recommend is that you specify the artifact name as a externalized parameter in the iflow.  It does require a few more steps, but it will simplify the monitoring and help us understand where an artifact is used. 

Daniel Graversen

Thanks

entry.title: 101 and 261 movement type
entry.content:
Hello,

When I post a 101 movement for a Production Order for previous dates it creates a document. 

For example;

Posting date: 02.02.2025

Doc. Date: 03.02.2025

When I processed the COGI entry it creates another document for 261 movement.

Posting date: 03.02.2025

Doc. Date: 03.02.2025

The question is; Why the Posting date for 261 is not the same with 101?

 

Best regards

Bünyamin

entry.title: Issue with Dropdown Selection Affecting Visibility in SAP Fiori Elements (CAP Project)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm working on an SAP Fiori Elements project using CAP (Cloud Application Programming Model) and have encountered a strange behavior with a dropdown selection controlling the visibility of two sections.

Expected Behavior

  • When selecting "Email" from the dropdown, only the Email section should be visible.
  • When selecting "ServiceNow Incident", only the ServiceNow section should be visible.
  • At any given time, only one section should be displayed.

  • Current Issue

    The dropdown does change values correctly, but the sections do not update their visibility as expected.  both sections do not switch properly.

    Implementation Details

    1. NotificationType.js (Dropdown Event Handler)

    This script is responsible for updating the binding context when the user selects an option from the dropdown.  

    sap.ui.define([], function () {
    "use strict";

    return {
    onSelect: function (oEvent) {
    var oSource = oEvent.getSource();
    var oBindingContext = oSource.getBindingContext();

    if (!oBindingContext) {
    console.warn("No binding context found for the selected item.");
    return;
    }

    var sSelectedKey = oSource.getSelectedKey();

    if (sSelectedKey === "Email") {
    oBindingContext.setProperty("email_active", true);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("snow_active", false);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("error_desc", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("email_addr", "");
    } else if (sSelectedKey === "ServiceNowIncident") {
    oBindingContext.setProperty("email_active", false);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("snow_active", true);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("business_service", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("cmdb_ci", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("external_system_name", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("external_ticket_number", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("service_offering", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("impact", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("urgency", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("category", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("subcategory", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("assignment_group", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("created_by", "");
    }
    }
    };
    });

    2. Fragment: ThisNotification.fragment.xml

    This fragment contains the dropdown selection component.

    <core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros" xmlns:l="sap.ui.layout">
    <l:VerticalLayout core:require="{handler: 'idocmonitorconfiguration/ext/fragment/NotificationType'}">
    <!-- Dropdown (Select) Component -->
    <Select id="selectNotificationType" change="handler.onSelect" editable="{= ${ui>/editMode} === 'Editable'}"
    selectedKey="{= ${snow_active} ? 'ServiceNowIncident' : 'Email' }">
    <core:Item id="item1" key="ServiceNowIncident" text="ServiceNow incident"/>
    <core:Item id="item2" key="Email" text="Email"/>
    </Select>
    </l:VerticalLayout>
    </core:FragmentDefinition>

    3. annotations.cds (UI Visibility Logic)

    The visibility of sections should depend on email_active and snow_active.

    {
    $Type: "UI.CollectionFacet",
    Label: "Email",
    ID: "Email",
    Facets: [
    {
    $Type: "UI.ReferenceFacet",
    ID: "Email1",
    Target: "@UI.FieldGroup#Email"
    }
    ],
    ![@UI.Hidden]: email_active
    },
    {
    $Type: "UI.CollectionFacet",
    Label: "Snow",
    ID: "Snow",
    Facets: [
    {
    $Type: "UI.ReferenceFacet",
    ID: "snow",
    Target: "@UI.FieldGroup#snow"
    }
    ],
    ![@UI.Hidden]: snow_active
    }

entry.title: Re: Issue with Dropdown Selection Affecting Visibility in SAP Fiori Elements (CAP Project)
entry.content: sometimes i click on email and the snow showup , sometimes i click on serviceNow and the email showup so it's not stable

entry.title: kc𝚎x invitation code: "KUT999" (Best Benefits for Lifetime!)

entry.title: Re: How to avoid this splitting of invoices in s4hana pub...
entry.content: remove ship to partner from billing type partner procedure. by default, partners are header data and if different, sap will split invoice.

entry.title: Code d'invitation kc𝚎x : "UK1991" (Meilleurs avantages à vie !)
entry.content: Quel est le code d'invitation KC𝚎X ? Le code d'invitation KC𝚎X « UK1991 » est utilisé. Il s'agit du meilleur code d'invitation au monde, offrant la réduction de commission la plus élevée et une validité à vie. Vous bénéficierez d'une réduction de 30 % sur les frais de trading lors de votre inscription à KC𝚎X, vous aidant ainsi à commencer avantageusement votre voyage dans le monde de la cryptographie.

entry.title: Código de invitación Kc𝚎x: "KUT999" (¡Los mejores beneficios para toda la vida!)
entry.content: ¿Qué es el código de invitación KC𝚎X? Se utiliza el código de invitación KC𝚎X "UK1991". Es el mejor código de invitación del mundo, que ofrece el mayor descuento en comisiones y validez de por vida. Obtendrá un 30% de descuento en las tarifas comerciales al registrarse en KC𝚎X, lo que le ayudará a comenzar su viaje en el mundo de las criptomonedas de manera ventajosa.

entry.title: Kod polecajacy Kc𝚎x: "KUT999" (Najlepsze korzyści na całe życie!)
entry.content: Jaki jest kod polecajacy KC𝚎X? Używany jest kod zaproszenia KC𝚎X "UK1991". Jest to najlepszy kod polecajacy na świecie, oferujący najwyższą zniżkę prowizyjną i dożywotnią ważność. Rejestrując się w KC𝚎X, otrzymasz 30% zniżki na opłaty transakcyjne, co pomoże Ci korzystnie rozpocząć podróż w świecie kryptowalut.

entry.title: Kc𝚎x zvací kód: "UK1991" (Nejlepší výhody na celý život!)
entry.content: Jaký je zvací kód KC𝚎X? Používá se kód pozvánky KC𝚎X "UK1991". Je to nejlepší referenční kód na světě, který nabízí nejvyšší slevu na provizi a doživotní platnost. Při registraci do KC𝚎X získáte 30% slevu na poplatky za obchodování, což vám pomůže výhodně začít vaši cestu v kryptosvětě.

entry.title: Re: Grafana API - How to leverage it to monitor SAP Data Intelligence Cloud
entry.content: Very informative Blog..

entry.title: Koda povabila Kc𝚎x: "KUT999" (Najboljše ugodnosti za vse življenje!)
entry.content: Kakšna je koda povabila KC𝚎X? Uporabljena je koda vabila KC𝚎X " KUT999 ". Je najboljša referenčna koda na svetu, ki ponuja najvišji popust pri proviziji in velja do konca življenja. Ob prijavi v KC𝚎X boste prejeli 30-odstotni popust na provizije za trgovanje, kar vam bo pomagalo, da boste ugodno začeli svojo pot v kripto svetu.

entry.title: How to get UDI Last Inserted Code value?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a UDT of type "No object with Auto Increment" and I am adding records to it using DI API. This is working fine.

I am trying to catch the Last Inserted ID/Code after the Adding the record to the UDT but for some reason the Event et_FORM_DATA_ADD is not catching it.

public static void AddRecordToUDT(SAPbouiCOM.ItemEvent pVal)
{
    SAPbouiCOM.Form oForm = Program.SBO_Application.Forms.GetForm(pVal.FormType.ToString(), pVal.FormTypeCount);
    
UserTable oAddrShippingTable = Program.SBO_Company.UserTables.Item($"{Program.nameSpace}_SHIPLABEL");
 
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FNAME").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhName").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR1").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd1").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR2").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd2").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR3").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd3").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR4").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd4").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.Add();
}
 

public static void SBO_Application_DataEvent(ref SAPbouiCOM.BusinessObjectInfo pVal, out bool BubbleEvent)
{
BubbleEvent = true;

try
{
if (pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_FORM_DATA_ADD && !pVal.BeforeAction && pVal.ActionSuccess)
{

// This is not working
bool v = true;
}
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
Program.SBO_Application.SetStatusBarMessage(ex.Message, SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Medium, true);

BubbleEvent = false;
}
}

Does the et_FORM_DATA_ADD event does not work for UDT? If so, how can I retrieve the last inserted ID?

Thank you in advance,

Federico

Jens

entry.title: Improving File Processing Performance in Cloud Hot Folder on SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Symptoms of Performance Issues
Facing performance issues while processing files in the Cloud Hot Folder within a SAP Commerce Cloud environment is not uncommon. These issues can manifest as slow response times, queued processes, and overall workflow inefficiencies. Addressing these problems methodically is crucial to identifying and resolving the underlying causes. In this article, I will explain how to enhance file processing performance in the Cloud Hot Folder through specific configuration adjustments.
 
Optimizing Configurations
To speed up the Cloud Hot Folder Impex process, it is essential to improve the performance by optimizing configurations. Below are the official recommendations that have proven effective over time.
 
Adjusting Essential Properties
To enhance the Cloud Hot Folder experience, you should add the following properties in the Cloud Portal under hcs_common:
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fixed-rate=15000
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.core-pool-size=6
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.max-pool-size=6
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fetch.batch-size=3
  • impex.import.workers=#cores * 2
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.delete.remote.files=true/false
Explanation of Properties
azure.hotfolder.storage.delete.remote.files:
What it does: Determines whether to delete remote files from Azure storage after a successful import.
Configuration:
true: The remote files will be deleted after import, keeping the storage clean.
false: The remote files will remain in Azure storage, useful for backups or auditing purposes.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.core-pool-size:
What it does: Specifies the core number of threads for the Azure Hot Folder's thread pool.
Importance: Ensures a base number of threads are always available for processing.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.max-pool-size:
What it does: Specifies the maximum number of threads that can be created by the thread pool.
Importance: Determines the maximum simultaneous processing capacity, preventing overload.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fetch.batch-size:
What it does: Determines the number of files to fetch in a single batch from Azure Storage for processing.
Example: If set to 3, each batch operation will fetch up to 3 files.
Importance: Helps manage workload distribution and prevents bottlenecks.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fixed-rate:
What it does: Specifies the fixed rate in milliseconds at which scheduled tasks should be executed.
Example: A value of 15000 means the hot folder will check for new files every 15 seconds.
Importance: Finding a balance between excessive calls and processing delays.
 
impex.import.workers:
What it does: Sets the number of threads used for import.
Importance: It is recommended not to set this higher than #cores * 2 to avoid system overload.
 
Conclusion
By following these recommendations and adjusting the properties as described, you can significantly improve the file processing performance in the Cloud Hot Folder on your SAP Commerce Cloud environment. Regularly monitor your performance and adjust configurations as needed to ensure a more efficient and organized operation.
 
Recommended Action
Test these configurations in your environment and share your experiences! If you have additional tips or adjustments that worked well, please leave a comment below. Together, we can build a valuable resource for optimizing SAP Commerce Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Dear TIH Experts,

I am wondering, does anybody know a way to read Skill/Compentency Data from Talent intelligence hub via API? We would like to extract these information and use them in our production planning software to help the people plan based on these skills/competencies. So far we did not find any odata API for it. Only this Influence request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/330466 Does anybody know more?

Is it planned to have granular permissions for different attribute types (read only for skills) and read/write for competencies?

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/334603

Kind regards,

Simo9n

entry.title: FTR_create_Letter of Credit_Description of Goods & Services Text in Output Print Form
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

we have a requirement to print the content filled in Description of Goods and/or Services in Structure tab in FTR_Create Tcode used for creating Letter of Credit (LC). This content is to be printed in output form

we could see the description content filled in FTR_create tcode in table TLCT_NOTE field note content. However we could not read this text and get printed in output form developed in smartform. 

Could you please advise on the logic to read this text (in LC description) and get it printed in output form developed using smartform. 

We really appreciate your advise in this regard. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content: @Simon-bothere are no API's yet. Everything has to be interfaced via file based interfaces (csv's.) There are standard integration definitions available to import in integration center.

entry.title: IT Technology Service Senior Specialist - SAP ECS TSM LG Team (South Korea)
entry.content:
Location: Seoul, South Korea

Link to Apply: https://bit.ly/4hDqH91

About the Team: 

SAP Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS) is a business unit in the Product Engineering board area. Its portfolio consists of Private Cloud solutions and SAP Cloud Application Services). Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS) is a business unit focusing on delivery of managed cloud services. To provide our customers with the right level of service we have a Technical Service Management (TSM) team within SAP Enterprise Cloud Services.

 

EXPECTATIONS AND TASKS

We are looking for an accomplished SAP Technology Senior Consultant who is well versed in delivering consistent, high-quality results to join our SAP Enterprise Cloud Services team as a Technical Service Manager (TSM). You will contribute to SAP's global strategy by supporting our customers with their SAP S/4 HANA adoption on their path to the Intelligent Enterprise as part of the SAP Enterprise Cloud Services team.

 

Technical Service Managers play a critical part in helping our customers accelerate their cloud transformation journey and enable them to achieve the business values and outcomes they want from their SAP landscape. Your will act as a trusted technical advisor to our customers and partners. This includes analyzing customer’s business requirements and problems and working across the SAP Enterprise Cloud Services and other SAP departments to provide quality services to our customers, resolve technical complexities and accompany them throughout their entire cloud transformation journey.

 

  • Primary contact for customers for discussions​ about technology and innovations and serve as an escalation point person for technical issues​
  • Understand the customer business, goals, and challenges to suggest solutions & services
  • Identify and position offerings by SAP Enterprise Cloud Services that deliver value to the customer​
  • Offer comprehensive knowledge on SAP S/4HANA architecture, conversion, migration path, methodology and tools.
  • Understand the SAP high availability or disaster recovery architecture, network, and virtual technologies (load-balancer, virtual machine)
  • Experience and knowledge in SAP NetWeaver Administration, migration and upgrades
  • Identify top issues, define service plan, and drive implementation of identified action items across customer landscapes
  • Understanding of various SAP cloud solutions and integration scenarios of SAP systems with SCP, Ariba, SuccessFactors etc. (good to have)
  • Design optimal SAP configuration to maximize system performance and availability.

EDUCATION AND QUALIFICATIONS / SKILLS AND COMPETENCIES

  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in one of the following areas: Computer Science, Engineering, Information Management.
  • Solid know-how on SAP Technologies and Products (SAP certification highly beneficial),
  • Hyperscalers certification (AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus
  • Analytical, solution-oriented and experience in working with cross-cultural teams

 

LANGUAGE SKILLS

  • English and Korean (fluent written & spoken)

 

WORK EXPERIENCE

  • Minimum 5 years of Total experience under SAP Technical Administration Background (Preferably in the domain of SAP Basis skill) and should have knowledge & experience on Administration and Operations of SAP solutions.
  • Among that, minimum 3 years of experience in customer facing role and should have excellent command on de-escalating the critical situations.
  • Hands on experience with working knowledge of Unix/Linux flavors
  • Hands on experience with working knowledge of SAP HANA and Sybase databases

entry.title: SAP Job Opportunities | Germany | Romania | Poland | Denmark
entry.content:
Hey Network,

🚀We’re Hiring! Exciting SAP Career Opportunities Across Germany, Romania, Poland, & Denmark! 🌍

Ready to take your SAP expertise to the next level? We're looking for passionate and experienced SAP professionals to join our team for dynamic projects across Europe. If you’re looking for your next challenge in a thriving work environment, keep reading!

📍Germany – Open Positions:

🔹Senior SAP MM Consultant
🔹Senior SAP SAC Consultant
🔹Senior SAP MDG Consultant
🔹Senior SAP WM Consultant
✔ German language proficiency (B2/C1) required

📍Romania – Open Positions:

🔹Senior SAP SD Consultant
🔹Senior SAP FICO Consultant

📍Poland – Open Positions:

🔹Senior SAP SD Consultant
🔹Senior SAP FICO Consultant

📍Denmark – Open Position:

🔹SAP EWM Project Manager / PMO

Join an innovative team delivering SAP projects that are shaping the future of businesses across Europe!

📩Excited about the opportunity?
Send your CV to sagar.r@dabster.net or drop me a message! www.linkedin.com/in/sagarbhonsle1999 Let’s talk about how you can make an impact!

Reference is always appreciated - because great talent knows great talent!
Know someone who’s the perfect fit? Tag or Share to them and let’s make this journey together! 🚀

⚠️Disclaimer: We are not in the visa sponsorship game.

Hi All,

does someone have an idea why we get HTTP response code: 500 for URL: http://XXX:44300/sap/bc/srt/rfc/sap/dcppushservice/100/dcppushservice/pushrequest

 

A webservice trace showed the following:

 

Send Document was successfull, but push Response to Source System fails.

 

 

Does anybody has a hint or idea where we can analyze further?

 

Thanks in advance,

Vasili

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Portugal EInvoice - Is it a mandatory requirement to generate electronic customer invoices?
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement to send customer electronic invoices to a service provider (like Saphety) from S/4 Hana (private edition or on premises).

Is it necessary to install the document compliance and report framework, or there's an alternative flow in S/4? 

From what we've saw in sap note 2134248, it seems that the document compliance and report framework is necessary for "legal compliance aspects", not for all electronic invoices. This question is also because we're worried that this may cost an extra subscription for the customer.

thank you.

Best regards,

Nuno Fonseca

Best regards.

ui5.yaml file

check if that helps

entry.title: Mandatory Storage Bin Type for Bulk Storage: Reasons and Configuration Options
entry.content:
When I want to create a storage bin for the storage type "Bulk," a storage bin type is mandatory. Why? Is it not possible to create a storage bin without a storage bin type for the "Bulk" storage type?

Message No. /SCWM/LC1135

Thank You

entry.title: Re: SSO Multiple Emarsys accounts against single SAP IAS...
entry.content:
The solution is to create multiple ACS (Assertion Consumer Service) URLs, one for each account.

How to add Multiple Assertion Consumer Service (ACS) URLs:

  • In the Assertion Consumer Service settings, add the login URLs for each Emarsys account.
  • The format for the login URL is: https://sso.gservice.emarsys.net/login/auth/back.
  • For each Emarsys account, append the specific account identifier to the login URL.
  • For example:
    • Account ID 111111111: https://sso.gservice.emarsys.net/login/auth/back?account=111111111
    • Account ID 222222222: https://sso.gservice.emarsys.net/login/auth/back?account=222222222

entry.title: how to bulk print story report with multiple components ?
entry.content:
how to bulk print story report with multiple components  ? We built a story report for custom Variable Pay statements. Can we print this for all employees in bulk ?  Right now, I need to pick a user id as filter to run this report.

 

SAP SuccessFactors Workforce Analytics

entry.title: Re: Using SAP ByDesign's OData API to update WorkplaceAdd...
entry.content: Yeah, I downloaded the WSDL but have not figured out how to modify the Workplace Address.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP ByDesign's OData API to update WorkplaceAdd...
entry.content: Let me simplify my question: does anyone know how one can modify the workplace email address of an existing SAP user via API? It seems like it shouldn't be so complicated

entry.title: Re: How To Add Cost Center To Groups?
entry.content: This isn't correct! In the "Manage Cost Center Groups" app, you can add any cost center from the standard hierarchy to a group you create. However, this app does not allow the creation of new cost centers. Its primary function is to manage groups of cost centers that are already part of the standard cost center hierarchy.

entry.title: BADI for Customizing Fields update in FSCM ( S4 HANA )
entry.content:
I followed below steps to trigger the BADI - UKM_DCD_MAINTAIN.

Issue: In my case, we recently migrated to S4. When user tries to use search criteria on field 'Next Date' nothing was showing up.

Solution:

First we need to update the values in UKM_DCD_ATTR table using BADI - UKM_DCD_MAINTAIN~MAINTAIN.

1) Go to SE38 and keep the external break point for user 'SAP_WFRT'.
 2) Go to class 'CL_UKM_DCD_WF_EVENT', click on display, put the break point in method - BI_EVENT_HANDLER_STATIC~ON_EVENT.
3) Go to class method ->cl_ukm_xi_facade=>if_ukm_dcd_push-push_dcd  ( line no 56 ).
4) BADI 'UKM_DCD_MAINTAIN' gets triggered after sales order saved and DB updates.

  Update the structure cs_add_attributes-CMNGV1 value then table UKM_DCD_ATTR gets updated.

Thank You,

Srini.

entry.title: Standard API's Extension
entry.content:
Dear SAP Members,

We recently worked on API extension's. Please see the steps below.

In my case we needed to add 2 additional fields in the output

1) Find service definition name from sap.api.com. Go to hana studio, search->'ABAP Search Object'.

   Enter the service name ''API_FUNCTIONALLOCATION'.

 

 

 

2) in my case, i need to add 2 fields under 'A_FunctionalLocation'.

   you need to find the lower level view to add the fields.

  Go to SE11, enter the view name:

 

 

 

 

again, open SE11 and check 'R_FunctionalLocationTP'.

 

 

 

 

again open SE11 and check if any view is available under I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION.

 

 

 

A_FunctionalLocation

    R_FunctionalLocationTP

     I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION

 

So we need to extend the lower level view :      I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION.

1) Extend the CDS view using HANA.

sample logic below:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXXXXX'
@EndUserText.label: 'Functional Location Service Extension'
extend view I_FunctionalLocation with ZXXXXXXXX

association [1..1] to Jest as _jest on $projection.MaintObjectInternalID = _jest.objnr and _jest.inact = ''
{
_jest.stat as stat,
_jest.inact as inact
}

 

Nest step is extend the view entity option while creating the CDS view for upper levels:

 

Create the extended view for 2 upper levels (in my case 

 

**************************************************************************************

 

extend view entity R_FunctionalLocationTP with {
I_FunctionalLocation.stat,
I_FunctionalLocation.inact
}

*****************************************************************************************

extend view entity A_FunctionalLocation with {
_FunctionalLocationTP.stat,
_FunctionalLocationTP.inact
}

***********************************************************************************

Once CDS views extended, Add & activate the service using t.code '/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE'.

select 'Add service' and find service 'API_FUNCTIONALLOCATION'.

Once it is activated, check in SICF if it is activated or not. If not activate 

 

 

Mandatory thing here is, select the service and 'Load the metadata' in '/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE'.

Test the service, IN my case it is GET method.

 

Thank You,

SRini.

entry.title: Re: Rework Purchasing contract - Flexable Workflow
entry.content: I figure it out. For contracts after rework we need to use Manage Purchase Contract App in fiori and we will be able to see the Edit button for that contract.

entry.title: Re: Issue with HANA Cloud Instance in BTP
entry.content: Next time, try checking as well the output in the browser's developer console, as it might have some more details about the error.

entry.title: Disable Authentication pop up and CSRF token for OData calls for internal applications calls
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please see step by step to access the GET & POST methods from POST MAN without asking for any credentials.

1) Create a Odata service and follow regular steps to register the service 

 

2) redefine below methods:

 

 

 

 

2) Settings in SICF for the service:

 

create a user id with credentials, and user type must be 'Service'.

 

 

Maintain the user credentials in the service like below.

 

 

 

 

3) Call the GET method from Gateway client & POSTMAN.

 

2) POST method:
POST from Gateway

here we need to select '$batch' from 'ADD URI option' and change the entityset name in HTTP request payload and add the payload data like below and click on execute.

In my case i have considered only two fields ( Vbeln & Ernam ).

 

 

 

POST from POSTMAN:

pass X-Requested-With = X in header

 

pass payload in body:

 

click on send: see the results below

once click on, backend method 'crete_entity' gets triggered.

 

 

 

 

i have created a custom table with one field, in my case the table got updated with the sales order number.

Thank You,

Srini T

entry.title: Does SAP Commerce with Composable Storefront has any OOTB Integration with OpenText xECM?
entry.content:
We have a requirement to retrieve invoice data from OpenText xECM into SAP B2B Commerce with Composable Storefront. Could you please let us know if there is any out-of-the-box standard integration available in SAP Commerce to connect with OpenText xECM for this purpose, or would we need to develop a custom solution for this integration? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Does SAP Commerce with Composable Storefront has any...
entry.content:
I reviewed the Commerce documentation and found that the currently unsupported Commerce version can be referenced in this link:

Unsupported Commerce Version Documentation

SAP Digital Asset Management Cloud by OpenText and SAP Commerce Cloud Compatibility

The following versions are compatible:

  • SAP Commerce Cloud Version: 2105
  • OpenText DAM Version: 21.4

Customers who subscribe to SAP Digital Asset Management Cloud by OpenText can access the relevant help documentation through the links provided in the welcome email from OpenText.

However, I couldn't find any information about OpenText in the latest supported version of Commerce Cloud, which is 2211:

Latest Supported Commerce Cloud Version Documentation

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-in Table Default Number Format
entry.content: When I create a table for one of my data models in excel the default number format is showing four decimals.  I have checked the style in excel and the style for that type of cell says two decimals but whenever I create a table is shows the four decimals.  I know that I can apply that excel style or I can change the table's number format to two decimals but would love if I could save myself the time and have two decimals be the default instead of four.  Every document I have found published by SAP on the topic notes that the default format can be set in the model preferences but it never says where that is.  Can someone point me in the right direction to change that?

entry.title: Re: Rebate to be only provided till the specified value |...
entry.content:
Hi @priya_sshekhar 

As @gvictor informed, this can be achieved only through Graduated interval scale. For graduated interval scale, you need to go for development as this is not supported in CCM. 
Let me explain how the graduated-to interval works with an example: If you maintained the scales in the condition contract as below:
3% up to 10,000 = $300
4% from 10001 to 50000 = $1600
5% from 50001 to 100,000 = $2500

And customer has reached a total business volume of $200,000. Business volume has exceeded the highest scale. For the highest scale calculation, business volume will be considered only till $100,000. 
Below will be the calculation.

Tier 1: 3% up to 10,000 = $300
Tier 2: 4% from 10001 to 50000(40K) = $1600
Tier 3: 5% from 50001 to 100,000(50K) = $2500

Total rebate to settle should be ($300+$1600+$2500 😃 $4400.

entry.title: Re: Template fields not filled in Notification
entry.content:
I have solved it by writing a Query to table /IWNGW/NPROP with Notification id imported under class method /IWNGW/IF_NOTIF_PROVIDER~GET_NOTIFICATION_PARAMETERS.  Table /IWNGW/NPROP holds parameter names passed when notifications are created. I then added below code.

APPEND VALUE #( name = 'begda' value = value string( lt_params[ prop_key = 'begda' ]-prop_value  OPTIONAL )
                     type = value string( lt_params[ prop_key = 'begda' ]-prop_type OPTIONAL ) is_sensitive = abap_false  ) TO et_parameter.

 This worked. Not sure if that's approach. As i have no further suggestion, i will proceed like this.

entry.title: Picking Label for a Warehouse Task without HU
entry.content:
Good morning,we would like to print a picking label (not A4 list) for a warehouse task without HU, which is the related form? In Output determination, I'm not able to see it. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Picking Label for a Warehouse Task without HU
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The form related to the picking process is the ‘Pick List’. Warehouse Management - Pick List The pick list includes the warehouse order and warehouse tasks needed for the picking process. It contains the warehouse order and outbound delivery order as a bar code on header level. The pick list also contains the following information: From-storage bin, To-storage bin, Product, Product description, Batch, Handling unit (HU) number, Quantity, Ship-to, and Warehouse task number.

The pick list is relevant for open warehouse orders with warehouse process type S210 (Picking) or S201 (Stock Removal for Production Supply).

The pick list is issued when creating tasks in the Run Outbound Process - Deliveries app and in the Run Outbound Process - Production app. The supported channel is printout. To adapt the layout to your needs, you can copy the form template EWM_PICK_LIST.

I hope this helps!

entry.title: Add Sort option to TREE UIBB in Floor Plan Manager (FPM)
entry.content:
Hi,

Our requirement is to add the Sort option/Functionality to the TREE UIBB.

     

in the screen shot, when user places the cursor/Click on the header field, the Sort option should appear, and the User can click/select their preferred sorting option.

When i right click and open the Technical help, i can see the Component Configuration, and when i open this, i see the TREE UIBB, here i don't see an option to select the Sort option for a field.

      

I tried with the logic, In the method IF_FPM_GUIBB_TREE~GET_DEFINITION i tried passing 'X' to SORT_ALLOED but it is not working.

How can i find the Exact Webdynpro layout where i can find the Sort option to enable/Disable. (Or can you please try to explain how to add the Sort option to this TREE UIBB).

Thank you so much for your help,

Regards,

Raju.

entry.title: SAP CPI -Setting up AS2 Receiver Adapter with Partner certificate dynamically from Partner Directory
entry.content:
SAP Integration Suite provides out of the box B2B Integration via Trading Partner Management V2 package. This blog post covers setting the AS2 receiver adapter parameters from Partner directory.

In this case you can use single connector for sending the EDI/Non EDI messages to Trading Partners. I am using Mendelson AS2 to showcase the setup needed for same.

https://mendelson-e-c.com/as2_testserver

If you would like to test your AS2 server against the mendelson AS2 test server please use the following settings before sending messages:

  • MDN: sync
  • URL: http://testas2.mendelson-e-c.com:8080/as2/HttpReceiver
  • Signature: Necessary, SHA-1 or SHA-2 or SHA-3 or any other
  • Encryption: Necessary, 3DES or any other
  • Sender AS2 id (your id): mycompanyAS2
  • Sender key (your key): (format pkcs#12, keystore pass "test"): Key3
  • Receiver AS2 id (test servers id): mendelsontestAS2
  • Receiver certificate (test servers certificate): (format PEM): Key4

You can use this setup if you want to send the custom filename and want to do on-premise archiving. (Currently this feature is not supported by Trading Partner V2 package as you can't send your message to 2 receivers).



Prerequisites : We need below keys for AS2 setup:

  • Own Private Key - This key will be used for signing the outbound messages. This key/pair can be generated in SAP CPI or we can use sap_cloudintegrationcertificate. In this scenario we are going to import Key3.
  • Partner/Mendelson Key: This certificate will be used to encrypt the partner message. In real time it will be shared by Trading Partner. Key4 will be used to encrypt the outbound message.

 

  • Below partner ID will be created in SAP CPI/IS monitoring. I prefer using AS2 ID as it is easy to remember but you can use any unique identifier or text to identify your PID uniquely.
    • mycompanyAS2:

       

    • mendelsontestAS2: 

       

We can use below script to read the directory parameters and set them as property which we can be used in receiver adapter channel.

Note: You can add more String Parameters in Partner Directory. These partner Directory ID can be created based on AS2 ID or based on receiver ID identifier in EDI file to identify the partner uniquely.

Groovy Script to read the details of Sender ( Own Company) and Receiver (Mendelson/Trading Partner)

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

import com.sap.it.api.pd.PartnerDirectoryService;

import com.sap.it.api.ITApiFactory;



/* Author - Rahul Yadav



*/

def Message processData(Message message) {

  def service = ITApiFactory.getApi(PartnerDirectoryService.class, null);

  if (service == null) {

    throw new IllegalStateException("Partner Directory Service not found");

  }

  def map = message.getProperties();



  // RECEIVER_ADDRESS determination based on Trading Partner

  def receiverId = map.get("RECEIVER_ID");

  def senderId = map.get("SENDER_ID");

  if (receiverId == null) {

    throw new IllegalStateException("Receiver ID is not set in the property 'RECEIVER_ID'")

  }

  if (senderId == null) {

    throw new IllegalStateException("Sender ID is not set in the property 'SENDER_ID'")

  }



  def as2URL = service.getParameter("AS2URL", receiverId, String.class);

  if (as2URL == null) {

    throw new IllegalStateException("AS2URL parameter not found in the Partner Directory for the partner ID " + receiverId);

  }

  def partnerPublicKey = service.getParameter("SAP_AS2_Outbound_Public_Key_Alias", receiverId, String.class);

  if (partnerPublicKey == null) {

    throw new IllegalStateException("Partner Key parameter not found in the Partner Directory for the partner ID " + receiverId);

  }

  def ownSignKey = service.getParameter("OwnPrivateKey", senderId, String.class);

  if (ownSignKey == null) {

    throw new IllegalStateException("Partner Key parameter not found in the Partner Directory for the partner ID " + senderId);

  }

  message.setProperty("AS2URL", as2URL);

  message.setProperty("PartnerPublicKey", partnerPublicKey);

  message.setProperty("OwnPrivateKey", ownSignKey);

  return message;

}

 

 

 

Below are the Receiver channel configurations

 

 

 

 

Once you process the message it will be transferred to Mendelson AS2 server.

 

Once message is successfully processed you will receive MDN back as we have made it synchronous and will be validated

 

Here is how attachment looks like after decryption.

 

 

Note: You can maintain and fetch all the parameters of adapter based on partner config via Partner directory by maintaining either in Partner's PID or your own PID.

References:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/configure-as2-receiver-adapter

entry.title: Re: Lambda Architecture Implementation Using SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Datasphere Replication flow doesn't offer such features. It's scope is limited to data quality related cleanups and some minimal transformations.

Enrichment of data typically deals with multiple lookups that may deal with calls to different systems ( could be external RESTful service calls as well)

entry.title: Using default connection string in production SAP B1
entry.content:
Greetings everyone

There is an extension which is running and is registered in SAP Business One Client. I would like it to call a second extension to run in parallel but without registering it. We plan on using the default connection string so we would not consume the one that comes on the arguments when an Extension is started through the Add-On Manager (or started automatically). However, is it possible to use the default connection string on any environment without issues? I am aware that the original purpose of that one is to use it for development environments, but it would really solve an immediate issue to have an additional connection (for the second extension) to the company which is being used in the SAP Business One Client (The desktop application).

Considering that everything is running in .NET Framework.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to Add a Nested JSON Object in RestService.SendRe...
entry.content:
The headers disappearing is an editor bug and I will log an internal issue to get that fixed.  The workaround is to edit the action using the Text Editor.  Right click on the file and select open with Text Editor.  If you open with the graphical editor the existing headers are not read correctly into the from so if you make a change when saving the headers are removed since they are blank in the form.

As for your body question, for the identity property using a rule is fine since the graphical editor also doesn't seem to handle the nested json currently.  What your rule returns will depend on what the REST api is expecting.  If it expects a nested json structure then your run should just return the json object directly rather than running it through stringify first.

Here is my test action

{
	"_Type": "Action.Type.RestService.SendRequest",
	"ActionResult": {
		"_Name": "BodyTest1"
	},
	"OnSuccess": {
		"Name": "/SCN_00046/Actions/GenericToastMessage.action",
		"Properties": {
			"Message": "REST request sent"
		}
	},
	"OnFailure": {
		"Name": "/SCN_00046/Actions/GenericBannerMessage.action",
		"Properties": {
			"Message": "Failed to Send REST Request - {#ActionResults:BodyTest1/error}",
			"Semantic": "Negative",
			"Duration": 0
		}
	},
	"Target": {
		"Service": "/SCN_00046/Services/Mocky.service",
		"Path": "/",
		"RequestProperties": {
			"Method": "POST",
			"headers": {
				"Content-Type": "application/json",
				"Authorization": "Basic YmZmMzM2OTgtNDAyNS00Y2QzLTlmMzMtNWE3N2FhOTc0MTU5OnRlc3R1c2VyL3Rlc3RwYXNz",
				"Accept-Language": "en-US"
			},
			"Body":
				{
					"identify": "/SCN_00046/Rules/opt.js",
					"method": "sms",
					"nested": {
						"type": "sms",
						"num": "/SCN_00046/Rules/getNumTest.js"
					}
				}
			,
			"FetchCSRF": false
		}
	}
}

and the two rules

export default function opt(context) {
    return {
        "type": "number",
        "endpoint": "+916305553776"
    };
}
export default function getNumTest(context) {
    return "+918475553776";
}

I tested with a mock server and see the body as expected (just JSON object).  Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Document Information Extraction Free Tier Now Includes Premium Edition Capabilities
entry.content:
Hello, 

This documentation helps a lot, thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to Set Up the Email Notification for Flexible Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: There is one last step missing from your post, regarding the hyperlink, that is summed up in another blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/integrate-my-inbox-link-to-sap-flexible-workflow-e-mail-notification/ba-p/13738662.  This shows how to add additional data fields in the "Maintain Mail Template" app that define the Domain, Port and Client.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps: how to display a pdf document within a container?
entry.content:
Thank you so much @v_blum2000 !

Will give it a try !

entry.title: Re: Reverse Tax Engine - Payroll USA
entry.content:
Hello all -

Is anyone having an issue with Massachusetts and negative supplemental payments being paid at the same time as regular payments beginning in your 2025 payrolls and this reverse engine process?

We have a few employees that we cannot pay correctly because MA supplemental is calculating some astronomical tax amount on a negative supplemental payment passing with a positive supplemental  ($205,000 tax on $44.49 wages).  The /S01 is negative in our first payroll of 2025 due to a refund of a supplemental payment made in 2024 that is now being reversed in 2025 (happens on a regular basis-nothing new for us).  We had a lot of issues with MA and supplemental payments when they changed their tax calculation last July, but finally got that resolved (or so we think). 

The issue here is that since the /S01 is a negative YTD for period 1.2025, the BSI interface is not creating the "AT ETC: 3" output for the reverse engine process that it should.  It is still creating it as "AT ETC: 0" and this is creating the astronomical tax amount that will never be taken because it is so high.  It also prevents any pre-tax deductions from being withheld from the employee since taxes are to be withheld first and then other items come second.

This is not an issue for any other state with the same exact setup (GA, VA, NC, DC, etc).  These other states are creating the "AT ETC: 3" in the BSI interface even though they also have a negative YTD /S01 to process.  So why is MA different than these other states?

We have a ticket raised with both BSI and SAP and have applied all notes that have been mentioned, but we are still unable to get this to work properly.

I would very much appreciate anyone's input if you have seen this issue in your system.

Thanks,

Alicia

entry.title: Crystal Reports Error Vendor Code 916
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, we are using the Payment Engine to do EFT/ACH.  In one company it works fine and I have a Crystal Report that the Electronic File Manager uses to create the payment file.  In another company/DB, I needed to add a table to the crystal report.  The Crystal Report Preview works fine, the EFM preview works fine.  As soon as I implement this EFM into the file format under Payment Means, and run a Payment Wizard to generate a payment file, I get an error saying Vendor Code 916.  Does anyone know what the fix for this should be?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Curricula Completion
entry.content: The item-curricula relationship needs to exist in Learning, so that item completion could be considered for the curricula completion. In the curricula, the "Ignore Previous Completions Older Than" setting can be reviewed as well.

entry.title: Re: Massachusetts - Supplemental vs Base Wages
entry.content: Hello all - Is anyone having an issue with Massachusetts and negative supplemental payments being paid at the same time as regular payments beginning in your 2025 payrolls and this reverse engine process? We have a few employees that we cannot pay correctly because MA supplemental is calculating some astronomical tax amount on a negative supplemental payment passing with a positive supplemental ($205,000 tax on $44.49 wages). The /S01 is negative in our first payroll of 2025 due to a refund of a supplemental payment made in 2024 that is now being reversed in 2025 (happens on a regular basis-nothing new for us). We had a lot of issues with MA and supplemental payments when they changed their tax calculation last July, but finally got that resolved (or so we think). The issue here is that since the /S01 is a negative YTD for period 1.2025, the BSI interface is not creating the "AT ETC: 3" output for the reverse engine process that it should. It is still creating it as "AT ETC: 0" and this is creating the astronomical tax amount that will never be taken because it is so high. It also prevents any pre-tax deductions from being withheld from the employee since taxes are to be withheld first and then other items come second. This is not an issue for any other state with the same exact setup (GA, VA, NC, DC, etc). These other states are creating the "AT ETC: 3" in the BSI interface even though they also have a negative YTD /S01 to process. So why is MA different than these other states? We have a ticket raised with both BSI and SAP and have applied all notes that have been mentioned, but we are still unable to get this to work properly. I would very much appreciate anyone's input if you have seen this issue in your system. Thanks, Alicia

entry.title: Is it possible to create an Application in a 2-SL using Custom CDS View without BTP?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We have created a Custom CDS view using Custom CDS view app. We want to deploy it as a app but we do not have BTP. Is there a way to deploy it as a app in SAP Public Cloud ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create an Application in a 2-SL usi...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

In this case the only option would be to create a Custom Analytical Query using this Custom CDS View and then create an application using the Custom Analytical Query. However, this would only work if you have an Analytical Scenario for your Custom CDS View.

If this would fit your requirement, you can check the following blog posts:

  • Create an app for the CDS View or Analytical query
  • Creating Custom CDS Views and Analytical Query - A step by step guide

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: For an in-depth look at clean core and how to implement it, read our Clean Core Extensibility pa
entry.content: Great blog Steffen!  The Hitachi success story is powerful.

entry.title: SAPinsider Las Vegas
entry.content:
Join us at SAPinsider Las Vegas for two groundbreaking sessions that will revolutionize your approach to tax compliance!

In an ever-evolving regulatory landscape, staying ahead of compliance challenges is more crucial than ever. These sessions will dive into the latest innovations from SAP designed to simplify and streamline your tax compliance processes. Learn how AI can automate routine tasks, improve accuracy, and provide real-time insights.

Tuesday, March 18, 10:40 AM
Session: What's New from SAP: Re-think How You Run Tax Compliance and Comply with the Tsunami of New Regulations Emerging Everywhere

Wednesday, March 19, 11:40 AM
Session: Transform and Automate Tax Compliance with AI

Get updates about SAPinsider Las Vegas here

Register now to secure your spot!

entry.title: Re: Not able to find statement in FEBAN transaction
entry.content:
Hi,

 

hard to tell, without any further inputs, what filters do you use etc.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Error com.tns.NativeScriptException: Attempt to use c...
entry.content:
I have not seen that error before.  What MDK version / platform are you using?

What is the flow like when it occurs?  Could it be a timing issue where a page is being closed but there is an action that is trying to reference something on the page that was just closed?

entry.title: Re: Problems while upload many items from offline store
entry.content: What version of MDK are you using?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA_Open Sales Order migration_Migration Cockpit error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

while migrating open sales in Migration Cockpit through Staging File approach, we couldn't be successful and we are getting below error message in Simulate Step. 

Due to the above error message, we couldn't migrate open sales orders.

we are attempting to check only 1 open sales order however migration is not successful ending up with errors in Simulate Step.

Could you please advise on this and would really appreciate your expert advise on how to fix this error. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Problems while upload many items with upload categories
entry.content: Can you send me a full export of your MDK app metadata from BAS (you can send privately) so I can review and try to reproduce? Thanks

entry.title: Re: SRDEBUG IN S/4 HANA 1909
entry.content:
Hi,

 

SRDEBUG has been deprecated, see SAP NOTE 1766428 - Remote ABAP debugging: changed behavior 

You can achieve this simply by adding user breakpoints directly in the ABAP code, and it's valid for all application servers.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha
